objects.name: Apple security advisory (AV26-466)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-466 Date: May 13, 2026 On May 13, 2026, Apple published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following product: Safari – versions prior to 26.5 The Cyber Centre encourages users and administrators to review the provided web links and apply the necessary updates. About the security content of Safari 26.5 Apple security releases
